mapper.sql: id, title, addr1, addr2, zipcode, tel, first_image as firstImage, first_image2 as firstImage2, read_count as readCount, sido_code as sidoCode, gugun_code as gugunCode, ST_Y(location) as latitude, ST_X(location) as longitude, mlevel, content_type_id as contentTypeId, overview
mapper.select: select , ST_Distance(location::geography, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326)::geography) as distanceMeters from attractions where location is not null and ST_DWithin(location::geography, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326)::geography, #{radiusMeters}) order by distanceMeters asc, title asc, id asc limit #{limit}
select count(*) from attractions where id = #{attractionId}
mapper.insert: insert into attraction_favorites (attraction_id, user_id) values (#{attractionId}, #{userId}) on conflict (attraction_id, user_id) do nothing
mapper.delete: delete from attraction_favorites where attraction_id = #{attractionId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into attraction_ratings (attraction_id, user_id, rating) values (#{attractionId}, #{userId}, #{rating}) on conflict (attraction_id, user_id) do update set rating = excluded.rating, updated_at = current_timestamp
mapper.delete: delete from attraction_ratings where attraction_id = #{attractionId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select id, name from attraction_tags order by name asc
insert into attraction_tags (name) values (#{name}) returning id, name
mapper.update: update attraction_tags set name = #{name} where id = #{tagId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from attraction_tags where id in #{id}
select attraction_id as attractionId, count(*)::int as count from attraction_favorites where attraction_id in #{id} group by attraction_id
select attraction_id as attractionId, favorite_count as count from attraction_popularity_stats where attraction_id in #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into attraction_popularity_stats (attraction_id, favorite_count, updated_at) values ( #{attractionId}, greatest(0, #{delta}), current_timestamp ) on conflict (attraction_id) do update set favorite_count = greatest( 0, attraction_popularity_stats.favorite_count + #{delta} ), updated_at = current_timestamp
mapper.select: select attraction_id as attractionId, coalesce(avg(rating), 0)::float8 as average, count(*)::int as count from attraction_ratings where attraction_id in #{id} group by attraction_id
select t.id, t.name from attraction_tags t join attraction_tag_mappings m on m.tag_id = t.id where m.attraction_id = #{attractionId} order by t.name asc
select attraction_id as attractionId, rating from attraction_ratings where user_id = #{userId} and attraction_id in #{id}
select attraction_id from attraction_favorites where user_id = #{userId} and attraction_id in #{id}
select from attractions where id in #{id}
